betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Steam Engine§f

§aEarly-game steam power — 85% efficiency, far better than the Stirling Engine. Best pre-turbine generator.§f

§6Crafting§f (at Tier 2 Anvil):
§b• Dense Stone ×16§f
§b• Steel Plate ×12§f
§b• Steel Shell ×2§f
§b• Copper Coil ×4§f
§b• Large Gear§f

§6Setup§f:
Firebox → §bBoiler§f (water → steam) → Steam Engine → Steam Condenser (low-pressure steam → water)
Creates a closed loop with no water loss. See the Boiler quest for details.

§6Specs§f:
§b• Capacity§f: 2,000 mB steam
§b• Throughput§f: 2,000 mB/t max
§b• Output§f: 3,400 HE/t (68 kHE/s)

§eTip§f: The boiler must sit on a heat source and needs a Fluid ID to select input water. Always include a steam condenser for closed-loop operation.
